name: PER_NUDGE_PLANS_VL
query: SELECT B.NUDGE_PLAN_ID, TL.NAME, TL.DESCRIPTION, B.NUDGE_PLAN_CODE, B.STATUS, B.START_DATE, B.END_DATE, B.CRITERIA_CONDITION1, B.CRITERIA_CONDITION2, B.CRITERIA_CONDITION3, B.CRITERIA_CONDITION4, B.CRITERIA_CONDITION5, B.CRITERIA_TYPE, B.LIST_ID, B.RULE_ID, B.OBJECT_TYPE, B.SUBSCRIBER_CODE, B.ENABLE_SCHEDULE, B.ENTERPRISE_ID, B.OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER, B.CREATED_BY, B.CREATION_DATE, B.LAST_UPDATED_BY, B.LAST_UPDATE_DATE, B.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN, B.ELIGIBILITY_PROFILE_ID FROM PER_NUDGE_PLANS_B B, PER_NUDGE_PLANS_TL TL WHERE B.NUDGE_PLAN_ID = TL.NUDGE_PLAN_ID AND TL.LANGUAGE = USERENV('LANG')
